text_block_list.text:
One day, as I pass by the station on my way
home...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I want to buy a ticket, but there are so
many people that I can't get to the ticket
machines.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I don't know what to do...
choice_data_list: Fight your way through the crowd.
Wait for the right moment to slip through.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Fight my way through, huh? Okay. That's
something I'm good at.

Oguri Cap heads to the ticket machine, muscling
her way through the crowd like a snowplow at the
height of winter.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I managed to get a ticket. That was harder
than I thought it'd be.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea making a purchase at a ticket
machine would be such a stressful experience...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, thanks. Your advice was really helpful.
I'm gonna get going now.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Wait for the right moment, huh? Okay, I'll see
what I can do.

Oguri Cap slowly makes her way through the
crowd and pops out right in front of the ticket
machine.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the advice. I managed to nab myself a
ticket.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it looks like my train's almost here. I'd better
get going now. Bye.

Matching the pace of those around you, then
bursting through at the final moment... That might
make for a good race strategy on slower tracks.
